phase_name: School Boards Wave 2 — Tigard-Tualatin SD 23J + Forest Grove SD 15 + Sherwood SD 88J

Requirements/decision coverage gates + roadmap annotation + plan commit

blockers.description: User machine experiencing memory pressure / stalls — session intentionally paused mid plan-phase
blockers.workaround: Resume after reboot; consider /gsd-plan-phase 184 --chunked to bound per-agent runtime

decisions.rationale: STATE.md stopped_at said 'ready to discuss Phase 184'; only pending discussable phase; user AFK

decisions.decision: All gray areas resolved to recommended options (carry Phase 183 decisions; bake 183-REVIEW WR-01/02/03 + IN-01..04 fixes into clones; single shared plan-set; D-Z1/D-Z2/D-R1..R5/D-B1 carried)
decisions.rationale: User AFK; Phase 181/182/183 precedent documented in those CONTEXT headers

decisions.decision: All three boards planned as 5-seat at-large (NOT 7-seat)
decisions.rationale: 184-RESEARCH.md verified live on all three official district sites 2026-07-04 — overturns the 'commonly 7-director' framing
On-disk MAX 1205 verified during research; on-disk counter authoritative; re-confirm at Wave-0

next_action: Resume planner: /gsd-plan-phase 184 — it will detect 184-01-PLAN.md ('Add more plans') and existing RESEARCH/PATTERNS/VALIDATION; instruct planner to author plans 02-04 mirroring 183's 4-plan shape, then run gsd-plan-checker. NOTE: workflow._auto_chain_active=true is still set, so plan-phase will auto-advance to execute-phase when planning passes; run 'gsd-sdk query config-set workflow._auto_chain_active false' first if auto-execution is not wanted.
context_notes: Same-shape clone of Phase 183 extended to 3 districts. Everything the remaining plans need is in 184-RESEARCH.md (verified rosters, per-member headshot URLs across finalsite/Edlio/WordPress-wp-json CDNs, exact WR fix SQL) and 184-PATTERNS.md (fixed excerpts). 184-01-PLAN.md's closing output block lists what Wave-0 must hand to plans 02-04. Open research questions for Wave-0: verbatim TTSD/FGSD office-title wording; Linda Harrington (FGSD Position 4) photo recoverability; TTSD Chair/Vice-Chair rotation staleness.
